Professional Versatile Banner Stand Hardware with Custom Vinyl & Fabric Banner Printing for Trade Show & Business Display Use PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice for Banner Stand Display Banner Size & Hardware Configuration Display Quantity Selection Custom Design Options PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Versatile Banner Stand Hardware with Custom Vinyl & Fabric Banner Printing

The Versatile Banner Stand provides excellent stability, easy adjustment and is capable of holding two different banners to create a double sided display. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick.

Price includes the Banner Stand hardware and a 36" x 72" full-color printed banner with professional finishing. The printed banners feature a 2" pole pocket on the top and bottom for secure hardware mounting. Keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges.

Available with durable 13 oz vinyl material for indoor and outdoor use, or premium Banner Soft Fabric for professional trade show displays. Dowels and mounting hardware are included with every order.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Material Options for Indoor & Outdoor Display Use

13 oz Vinyl Banner Material for Banner Stands

Our high quality 13 oz vinyl banner material is the standard material we use for banner stands. It is rated for both indoor and outdoor use. You can select to have either (1) 13 oz vinyl banner or (2) 13 oz vinyl banners printed for the stand.

Banner Soft Fabric Material for Trade Show Displays

Our Banner Soft material is our fabric option for banner stands. The material offers a matte finish with vibrant print colors. The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend you be very careful when retracting the banner as some fraying may still happen. You can select to have either (1) fabric banner or (2) fabric banners printed for the stand.

Click here to request a sample packet of materials

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing Options for Professional Display Mounting

All banner stands include professional pole pocket finishing for secure hardware mounting:

  • 2" pole pocket on top and bottom edges
  • Hot knife cut edges on fabric banners to prevent fraying
  • Dowels included with all banner stand orders
  • Compatible with rigid substrates up to 6mm thick

The versatile banner stand hardware accommodates both single and double-sided display configurations. Keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from top and bottom edges for optimal display appearance.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Banner Stand Orders

2 Business Days Express Production

Rush production available for urgent trade show and display needs.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Standard production time for most custom banner stand orders.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Economy production option for advance planning and budget-conscious orders.

Production times begin after artwork approval. All banner stands include hardware assembly and quality inspection before shipping.

Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts for banner stand orders. Net payment terms available for qualifying business customers.

  • Secure online checkout
  • Business account options
  • Net payment terms for qualifying customers
  • Order confirmation and tracking provided

Contact our customer service team at 866.419.7446 for assistance with large orders or custom payment arrangements.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Banner Stand Hardware & Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

Banner stand hardware ships separately from printed banners in most cases. Hardware is packaged in compact, flat boxes for efficient shipping and easy transportation to your display location.

Packaging Information

The versatile banner stand breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. Dowels and mounting hardware are securely packaged to prevent damage during transit.

Shipping costs calculated based on size, weight, and destination. Expedited shipping options available for rush orders.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Business Display Uses for Versatile Banner Stands

The versatile banner stand is perfect for professional display applications:

  • Trade show booth displays
  • Business lobby and reception areas
  • Conference and seminar presentations
  • Retail store promotions
  • Job fair recruiting displays
  • Educational institution events
  • Restaurant menu and promotion displays
  • Real estate open house signage

The double-sided display capability allows for maximum message impact in high-traffic areas. Adjustable hardware accommodates various banner sizes and display configurations.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Display Printing

Vector File Specifications

Vector-based .eps files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality for banner stand displays.

File Format Guidelines

  • High resolution PDF or EPS files preferred
  • 300 DPI minimum resolution for raster images
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Keep important text and graphics 3" from top and bottom edges

Design Considerations

Account for 2" pole pockets on top and bottom when designing your banner. Our design team can assist with file preparation and optimization for banner stand display.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Banner Stands with Professional Display Hardware

Get started with your custom versatile banner stand order today. Choose from durable vinyl or premium fabric materials, upload your artwork or select from professional templates, and receive your complete banner stand kit ready for immediate display use.

Our banner stand experts are available to assist with material selection, artwork preparation, and hardware questions. Call 866.419.7446 or use our online design tools to create your professional display solution.

Every versatile banner stand order includes hardware, dowels, mounting accessories, and professional banner printing with quality guarantee.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand FAQ

What's included with the versatile banner stand?

Each order includes the banner stand hardware, dowels, mounting accessories, and your custom printed 36" x 72" banner with pole pockets.

Can I order additional banners for the same hardware?

Yes, replacement banners can be ordered separately and will include the same 2" pole pocket finishing for compatibility with your existing hardware.

What's the maximum thickness for rigid substrates?

The horizontal support bars can accommodate rigid substrates up to 6mm thick in addition to fabric and vinyl banners.

How does the double-sided display work?

The versatile banner stand can hold two different banners simultaneously, allowing for different messages on each side of your display.

Is assembly required?

Minimal assembly is required. The banner stand breaks down for shipping and assembles quickly for display use with included instructions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
